report.summary: Audited 4 newest learn pages for UX issues, created 2 missing OG images, fixed OG metadata on 4 pages, added BackToTop component to dYdX page, and added mobile table overflow wrappers to Abstract Chain page.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: dYdX Chain page: replaced custom inline back-to-top with shared BackToTop component for consistent UX
Abstract Chain page: wrapped 2 data tables in overflow-x:auto containers for mobile responsiveness
Abstract Chain page: added OG image references (images array) to openGraph and twitter metadata
Initia page: added OG image references (images array) to openGraph and twitter metadata
Post-Quantum page: fixed relative OG image path to full HTTPS URL format with images array

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: abstract-chain-zk-rollup-2026 (1200x630) — purple/pink Abstract brand accents with ZK hexagon patterns
OG image: initia-interwoven-rollups-2026 (1200x630) — blue Cosmos accents with interconnected node network and modular block diagrams
